caption: A man, identified by on-screen text as "नित्यानंद राय, केंद्रीय मंत्री," speaks into a microphone with an "ANI" logo during a news broadcast. He is wearing a brown shirt and a grey and white checkered shawl draped over his shoulders. He stands outdoors with green foliage and blurred figures of other men in the background. The screen is filled with news graphics, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a ticker at the bottom that reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: NDA सरकार में विकास को गति मिलेगी". Small inset photos of other individuals, such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी," appear on the sides. Across the frames, a white banner at the top updates its text, transitioning from "2024 में J" to "2024 में JDU के साथ". A red banner at the bottom right consistently displays "MAHARODH" and the time "10:06 PM".
